prose_before_bridge: Before the breakthrough, the problem was not that machines had no words. It was that their memory of a sentence was brittle, compressed, and easily lost.
prose_after_bridge: A good diagram of the bottleneck should leave the reader with pressure, not closure: the field needed a way for every word to keep asking every other word what mattered.
claim_safety_note: Do not claim a complete NLP history, priority settlement, or Transformer inevitability.
integration_gate: Use only if the chapter still feels too open after prose polish.

figure_title: Attention Is A Mixing Operation, Not A Mind
prose_before_bridge: The beautiful trick in attention is modest enough to be misunderstood. It does not think; it lets positions in a sequence exchange information with unusual directness.
prose_after_bridge: That is why the mechanism matters. It gave the model a better way to move meaning around a sentence, while leaving truth, intention, grounding, and judgment outside the drawing.
claim_safety_note: Block consciousness, intention, truth, grounding, faithful explanation, and complete modern LLM implementation claims.
integration_gate: Pair with shortened reader-facing caption and nearby provenance note.

figure_title: Loss Is A Map, Not A Product Guarantee
prose_before_bridge: The curve was seductive because it made progress look legible. But legible is not the same as guaranteed.
prose_after_bridge: What scaling made possible was a disciplined bet: more compute, more data, and bigger models could move a measured loss. It did not promise a useful product, a truthful answer, or a safe system.
claim_safety_note: Block automatic truth, safety, product success, emergence threshold, and revenue claims.
integration_gate: Place immediately after prose that frames scaling as bet rather than destiny.

prose_before_bridge: The assistant voice felt simple from the outside, but the product depended on a stack of behavioral work below the chat box.
prose_after_bridge: The figure should make alignment feel like labor, not magic: demonstrations, preferences, rules, evaluations, and failures all press against the final answer the user sees.
claim_safety_note: Block solved safety, hallucination elimination, universal alignment, and current-product claims.
integration_gate: Use before any product-surface screenshot so the surface does not outrun mechanism.

figure_title: ChatGPT: From Interface Event To Business Surface
prose_before_bridge: The first shock was a public interface. The second was that the interface immediately suggested a business surface: subscriptions, plugins, enterprise controls, and distribution.
prose_after_bridge: The timeline should not tell the reader that adoption or productivity was proven. It should show why every company suddenly had to ask what a chat box might become.
claim_safety_note: Block adoption, productivity, revenue, named-customer, and ecosystem-success claims.
integration_gate: Pair with only the strongest product surface; do not repeat every launch page.

figure_title: Inference Cost Stack: What The Chat Box Hides
prose_before_bridge: A chat answer feels weightless because the interface hides the stack. Microsoft understood that the weight would land somewhere.
prose_after_bridge: Once the answer becomes workload, the story leaves the chat window and enters latency, serving software, accelerators, governance, and datacenters. That is the cloud bargain hiding in plain sight.
claim_safety_note: Block exact cost, margin, cloud share, productivity, and ROI claims.
integration_gate: Use as the handoff from strategic partnership prose into infrastructure/economics.

prose_before_bridge: A leaderboard is most dangerous when it looks easy to read. Before the ranks, the reader needs to know what kind of game is being scored.
prose_after_bridge: The method note should create useful distrust: the table can show one historical slice, but it cannot crown the best model, predict product value, or settle a task outside its scope.
claim_safety_note: Block live rank, broad best-model, task-superiority, price-quality, safety, latency, and enterprise-usefulness claims.
integration_gate: Methodology figure must precede any sorted rank chart.

prose_before_bridge: The keynote is useful because it shows how NVIDIA wanted the market to see the machine. It is not useful as neutral proof that the machine already works as advertised.
prose_after_bridge: After the slide, the prose must return to source discipline: stagecraft can reveal strategy, but performance, deployment, availability, and partner claims still need independent support.
claim_safety_note: Block NVIDIA roadmap, performance, partner, availability, revenue, and deployment claims unless independently corroborated.
integration_gate: Use only with explicit source-actor framing and page-level provenance.

prose_before_bridge: The industrial story becomes real when the token leaves the screen and touches the grid. A model answer is not only math; at scale, it is land, transformers, cooling, interconnection, and scheduling.
prose_after_bridge: The flow should make the constraint physical without inventing a universal energy-per-token number. It shows where the pressure travels, not a measured conversion rate.
claim_safety_note: Block exact energy per token, site capacity, emissions, workload, PUE, and delivered-power claims.
integration_gate: Use as the anchor exhibit; prune nearby figures that repeat the same pressure.

prose_before_bridge: The coding-agent story is thrilling only if the test remains visible. A score without the harness is just a rumor with numbers.
prose_after_bridge: The caveat matrix should sharpen suspense: models can improve on a benchmark while still failing real repositories, tools, permissions, review, or deployment context.
claim_safety_note: Block best-coding-model, raw productivity, adoption, enterprise outcome, and universal safety claims.
integration_gate: Place before any prose that compares agent capability across systems.

prose_before_bridge: The meter the user sees is not the ledger the operator manages. Token economics begins in that gap.
prose_after_bridge: The board should make the business pressure visible while refusing the tempting leap from price surface to margin, cost per token, utilization, or profit.
claim_safety_note: Block provider margin, cost per token, revenue, profitability, utilization, ROI, productivity, and price-quality frontier claims.
integration_gate: Choose this or the cost-latency ladder first; avoid two meter-heavy spreads in sequence.

prose_before_bridge: The ending should not pretend that the race resolves itself. Prediction, tools, infrastructure, economics, and trust all return to human judgment.
prose_after_bridge: If the final figure stays, it must behave like a doorway back to responsibility, not a dashboard of everything the book has already explained.
claim_safety_note: Block inevitability, AGI, consciousness, solved trust, autonomy, productivity, and prophecy claims.
integration_gate: Final page must end on prose or motif after the visual, not on apparatus.
